description_long: This is a small, weathered convenience store with a corrugated metal roof showing significant rust and age. The structure is primarily made of wood, with a front-facing glass window and a small blue awning over the entrance. The store sits on a concrete platform with a curb painted in red and white stripes, adjacent to a paved road. A wooden utility pole with overhead wires stands at the front corner, adorned with posters and advertisements. The side and rear walls are wooden, with some greenery growing on the back, and the side wall features additional posters and a metal security gate. The overall appearance suggests a modest, utilitarian building typical of older urban or roadside environments.
description: A small, rustic convenience store with a rusted metal roof, wooden walls, glass storefront, and a curbside setting with utility pole and posters.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main glass window, blue awning, entrance, curb, and utility pole with overhead wires and posters.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the wooden wall, multiple posters, and the utility pole with visible overhead wires.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rusted corrugated metal roof, wooden back wall, metal security gate, and some greenery growing on the wall.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the blue awning, glass entrance area, and more of the wooden wall with some greenery.
attribute_storefront_signage: Multiple posters and advertisements are attached to the utility pole and side wall, featuring various colors and text, but no illuminated or mounted main signage above the entrance.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: None; the entrance appears to be a simple opening or possibly a non-glass door under the blue awning.
attribute_display_windows: A single large glass window at the front, framed in wood, partially transparent with visible interior items and some advertisements.
